scripts.compile: wagmi generate && mkdir -p abi && cp artifacts/contracts/FeedFaceDisperse.sol/FeedFaceDisperse.json abi/FeedFaceDisperse.json
scripts.push: git remote remove publish 2>/dev/null; git remote add publish git@github-personal:lsheva/feedface-multisend.git && git push publish HEAD --follow-tags; git remote remove publish
